title: Market Analysis and Positioning Services for Business Technology — Aberdeen Group Overview Presentation
author: Peter S. Kastner / Aberdeen Group
subject_domain: IT market research; corporate positioning; client engagement model
abstract: Aberdeen Group's corporate overview presentation (version October 29, 2000) covering the firm's mission, service portfolio, client engagement model, and coverage areas. Documents Aberdeen's 'Define, Differentiate, or Disappear' positioning tagline and describes the RAMP methodology, Advisory Access Service (AAS), Profile, Impact, Viewpoint, and Executive Briefing Paper deliverables. Includes technology coverage wheel and competitive context.
importance_rationale: External corporate positioning document; shows how Aberdeen presented itself to prospective clients circa October 2000
relevance_rationale: Provides client-facing view of Aberdeen services complementing internal training documentation
prescience_rationale: Coverage taxonomy anticipated later IT analyst coverage frameworks; AAS advisory model became industry standard
